source.title: Effectiveness of glucose-lowering drugs in older adults with type 2 diabetes: a network meta-analysis
source.abstract: Illustrative source metadata used for the Claims subnet RFC demo.

chunks.text: Across 592 randomized clinical trials including 309,503 participants, SGLT2 inhibitors reduced HbA1c in adults with type 2 diabetes. The magnitude of the effect was smaller at older ages.

claim.claim_text: SGLT2 inhibitors reduce HbA1c in adults with type 2 diabetes.

object.value: HbA1c in adults with type 2 diabetes

evidence.summary_text: Across 592 randomized clinical trials including 309,503 participants, SGLT2 inhibitors reduced HbA1c.
